title: 101 Screening along with Love and Pop
display_title: 101 Screening along with Love and Pop
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Jul 31, 2008 6:38 am Don't know if it means anything but for the first time since April the news section on the EVANGELION homepage lists something new. http://www.evangelion.co.jp/news.html I tried to translate it using the almight Internet but all I got was some gooblygook that I ASS-U-ME is just some public showing of Eva 1.01.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Jul 31, 2008 9:01 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: Don't know if it means anything but for the first time since April the news section on the EVANGELION homepage lists something new. http://www.evangelion.co.jp/news.html I tried to translate it using the almight Internet but all I got was some gooblygook that I ASS-U-ME is just some public showing of Eva 1.01.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 31, 2008 12:47 pm Papa: FYI, you're in the totally wrong thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Jul 31, 2008 3:43 pm AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH WITH THE THREADS!!!! ...which one is this "supposed" to be in? So much for free speech apparently.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jul 31, 2008 4:10 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: ...which one is this "supposed" to be in?
